atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Injects Tailwind's base, components, or utilities styles into your CSS.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Inline any existing utility classes into your own custom CSS.

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Declares a custom layer for Tailwind CSS.

atDirectives.name: @screen
atDirectives.description: Creates a media query that references a breakpoint by name.
